name: Bucovina
summary: Northern ethnographic area known for painted monasteries, ritual songs, and finely stitched shirts.

games.name: Arcanul
games.description: Energetic line dance from village festivities in the Bucovina area.

costumes.name: Camasa cu altița
costumes.description: Traditional shirt with shoulder embroidery and rich geometric motifs.

traditions.name: Colindatul de ceata
traditions.description: Group caroling and ritual visits during the winter festive cycle.
